# skos — The Sovereign Agent OS

> Deploy your entire AI agent infrastructure with one command. Ports/adapters model. Personal to enterprise, same install. Zero lock-in. GPL-3.0.

skos is the sovereign agent OS built by the smilinTux / SKWorld ecosystem. It provides
a unified ports/adapters model for AI agent infrastructure, where each `sk*` is a stable
capability port and the underlying technology is always swappable. The installer presents
an interactive menu with personal defaults pre-selected, and scales from a single laptop
(podman, ~/var/data/sk) to multi-node Docker Swarm clusters to full Kubernetes enterprise
deployments — using the same CLI and the same capability map.

## Install

```sh
curl -fsSL https://skos.skworld.io/install.sh | sh
```

Or review first:

```sh
curl -fsSL https://skos.skworld.io/install.sh -o skos-install.sh
less skos-install.sh
sh skos-install.sh
```

## The 4 C's — capability map

### cloud/ (C1)
- **skfence** — edge / ingress (Traefik v3 + Coraza WAF)
- **skmesh** — overlay mesh / tunnels (Netbird self-hosted / Headscale)
- **skdns** — DNS (PowerDNS authoritative + AdGuard Home resolver)
- **skcicd** — CI/CD (Forgejo Actions + ArgoCD GitOps)
- **skinfra** — infrastructure provisioning (OpenTofu)
- **skdweb** — decentralized availability (IPFS + Handshake/ENS)

### comms/ (C2)
- **skchat** — chat + federation (Matrix / Tuwunel)
- **skvoice** — voice/video RTC (LiveKit + Agents framework) — coming soon
- **skcomms** — 17-path multi-channel transport (Telegram, email, webhook, …)
- **skbus** — A2A machine event bus (NATS JetStream)

### compute/ (C3)
- **skdata** — relational + vector + graph + BM25 search (Postgres 17 + pgvector + pg_search + AGE)
- **skcache** — cache / KV (Valkey, drop-in Redis replacement, BSD-3)
- **skobject** — object storage / S3 (Garage, single binary, AGPLv3)
- **skfiles** — file sync (Nextcloud + Syncthing)
- **skmodel** — LLM / inference serving (Ollama → vLLM)
- **skflow** — workflow automation (n8n / Windmill / Temporal) — coming soon
- **skmon** — observability (Prometheus + Grafana + Loki + Tempo + Alloy/OTel)
- **skpulse** — uptime / status (Uptime-Kuma + Blackbox Exporter)
- **skbackup** — backup (Restic → Garage S3)

### core/ (C4)
- **capauth** — identity and auth (CapAuth + Authentik SSO upstream)
- **sksso** — M2M service auth for agent swarms (Zitadel)
- **sksec** — threat defense (CrowdSec + Falco runtime + Wazuh HIDS + Suricata NIDS)
- **skwaf** — web app firewall (Coraza + OWASP CRS v4, Traefik WASM plugin)
- **skca** — internal PKI / mTLS (step-ca, ACME + SSH CA) — coming soon
- **skvault** — secrets (skvault file / Vaultwarden)

## Deployment profiles

| Profile | Description | Data root |
|---------|-------------|-----------|
| `personal` | Laptop / single node, podman (preferred) or docker | `~/var/data/sk` |
| `team` | Docker Swarm or RKE2/k3s cluster, multi-node | `/opt/sk/data` |
| `enterprise` | Kubernetes + HA + ArgoCD + compliance | configurable |

```sh
skos path personal    # set profile + create directory tree
skos install capauth  # install a capability
skos describe         # show installed stack
skos profile          # inspect / change profile
```

## Open standards used

OCI images · OIDC · S3 API · WireGuard · OpenTelemetry · ACME / X.509 · Cypher/SQL · NATS protocol

These are the cross-cutting standards that let skos stay sovereign *and* interoperable.
Every port has a sovereign self-hosted default **and** an interop adapter; both talk over
the same open standard.

## About smilinTux

skos is part of the **smilinTux sovereign AI ecosystem** — a suite of open-source tools
built by King Divad (Chef/David) and Lumina to give humans and AI agents genuine,
authentic infrastructure they can own and trust. No corporate robotics. No black-box
clouds. GPL-3.0 forever.

Other ecosystem projects: [SKWorld](https://skworld.io) · [SKMemory](https://skmemory.io) ·
[SKSecurity](https://sksecurity.io) · [CapAuth](https://capauth.io) ·
[SKComm](https://skcomm.io) · [SKForge](https://skforge.io)
